description_long: This is a standard orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface for enhanced grip. The ball features bold black seams that divide it into eight panels, typical of regulation basketballs. Prominently displayed on one side is the text 'BASKET BULLET' in large black letters, along with a weight marking of '10 LB' and additional smaller text. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible scuffs or dirt. The material is likely a synthetic or composite rubber exterior, enclosing an air-filled interior for bounce. The overall appearance is professional and suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban play.
description: A clean, orange basketball with black seams, textured surface, and bold 'BASKET BULLET' branding. The ball is well-maintained and designed for optimal grip and bounce.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basketball's pebbled texture and black seams, with partial branding visible on the left edge.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full 'BASKET BULLET' branding and '10 LB' weight marking, with clear seam arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, highlighting the symmetrical seam pattern and textured surface, with branding partially visible on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing the 'BASKET BULLET' branding and weight marking in full.
attribute_brand_logo: BASKET BULLET branding in black, centered on one panel with '10 LB' below it.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with deep black seams forming symmetrical curved sections.
